header.reportTooltip: Turn this chat into a structured case report (Markdown)

empty.desc: Explore local MIMIC-III clinical notes in plain language, or use the clinical support tools. Click a sample below to start; the model always asks for your approval before it queries the database.
empty.starter1: 65-year-old man with chest pain and cold sweats; BP 85/50, HR 132, SpO2 91% — assess the vital signs and suggest a TTAS triage level
empty.starter2: Expand into a SOAP note draft: 60-year-old woman, epigastric pain for 3 hours, nausea, suspected gallstones, stable vital signs
empty.starter3: What note categories are in the database, and how many of each?
empty.starter4: Record summary for SUBJECT_ID 109: admissions, date range, and most recent notes
empty.starter5: Find radiology reports that mention pneumonia and show the matching snippets
empty.starter6: Patient record summary for SUBJECT_ID 99999999: admissions, date range, recent notes

composer.placeholder: Type your question (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
composer.placeholderHitl: Please respond to the tool approval request above…
composer.disclaimer: All inference runs on local Ollama; every tool call needs your approval.

a11y.approvalNeeded: A tool call needs your approval.

noExport: Nothing to export in the current chat.
